channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Thu May 14: Focus on multimodal data and safety in AI systems
item.description: Today's research highlights the importance of multimodal datasets and safety in AI applications. Notable works include the OmniLiDAR framework for 3D scene generation and the WARDEN model for endangered language translation.
